name: kling-v2.6
description: Kling 2.6 Pro: Top-tier image-to-video with cinematic visuals, fluid motion, and native audio generation

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio of the video. Ignored if start_image is provided.

duration.description: Duration of the video in seconds

generate_audio.description: Generate audio for the video. When enabled, the model will create synchronized audio based on the video content.
generate_audio.title: Generate Audio

negative_prompt.description: Things you do not want to see in the video
negative_prompt.title: Negative Prompt
